$schema_note: SHARED cross-department SOP manifest for the GHL (Convert and Flow = Go High Level) native FORM engine. This is the universal-sops face of the capability: it is how ANY department (web-development / crm / marketing / sales / customer-support) discovers and drives the end-to-end form pipeline. It does NOT re-implement the engine. The authoritative machine spine lives in Skill 6: 06-ghl-install-pages/tools/ghl_form_builder.py (the THINK layer _resolve_fields / plan_dependencies / _tag_attachment_plan / _build_form_plan / _emit_click_list phases F1..F13 / _run_preflight checks F-P1..F-P8), the live builder rail 06-ghl-install-pages/references/forms-playbook.md, and the locked selectors 06-ghl-install-pages/tools/SELECTORS-LIVE-form.md. The tool is GLUE, not the clicker: it emits ordered agent-browser commands and owns only its ledgers; it never mutates GHL state directly. This file mirrors universal-sops/funnel-craft/FUNNEL-PIPELINE-MANIFEST.json's enforcement-spine pattern so a department reads ONE manifest to know the phases, the owning roles, the SOP for each phase, and the AF-FORM-* gate codes. SOP-LOCKED: any added/changed SOP, field rule, or gate MUST stay in lockstep with ghl_form_builder.py (_run_preflight F-P1..F-P8 + the F1..F13 click list) and qc-built-form.sh.

authoritative_engine.engine_note: THINK/DO two-layer split. SMART/THINK (this Python, run under a client reasoning model) decides WHAT form to build, resolves every field property, pre-plans the zhc_ dependencies, and emits a fully-explicit click list. DUMB/DO (agent-browser, MiniMax M3 probe-gated) executes the click list verbatim and makes NO decisions.
authoritative_engine.click_list_phases: F1..F13 (F1 nav->Forms, F2 create, F3 rename to ZHC name, F4 trim defaults, F5 standard fields via Quick Add, F6 custom fields via Add Object Fields, F7 save draft, F8 style + Custom CSS, F9 preview, F10 Integrate capture embed snippet + form link, F11 embed splice into a GHL page verbatim, F12 tag-attach workflow handoff, F13 verify)
authoritative_engine.preflight_checks: F-P1 location_id, F-P2 location_gate (no co-mingling), F-P3 spec_present, F-P4 zhc_field_keys, F-P5 zhc_tags, F-P6 zhc_form_name, F-P7 custom_via_object_fields, F-P8 headless_guard

dispatcher.note: Requests route to the form engine via the build_form dispatcher verb (next to build_survey / build_funnel). The dispatcher owns the seeded token-only browser session and the location gate; the tool never logs in.

delivery_rail.rule: Skill 6 is the ONE GHL delivery rail for FUNNELS / WEBSITES / SURVEYS / FORMS. ghl_form_builder.py is GLUE not the clicker: it emits agent-browser commands and owns only its own ledgers; embed splice -> ghl_rest_canvas code element (the SKILL44_WIDGET -> FORM path, VERBATIM no SRI); render verify -> ghl_verify.render_check. A hand-rolled GHL REST call is the ungoverned path and is refused.

dependency_rail.rule: The grocery-shopping rule: Skill 44 PRE-CREATES every custom field + tag (each carrying the lowercase zhc_ marker) idempotently (GET-then-reuse-or-create) BEFORE any browser step, and refuses to build against missing dependencies. Custom-field create-on-the-fly in the browser is DISALLOWED. Custom fields reach the form ONLY by dragging the pre-created field from Add Object Fields (name + key LOCKED).

phases.name: Lock the form brief in ONE block
phases.owning_role: GHL form-build operator (web-development / crm / marketing) — Skill 6 THINK layer
phases.produces: the locked form brief (task spec: standard + custom fields, tags, embed target, styling/custom-CSS, keep/delete defaults, form NAME) -> seeds routing/form-plan.json

phases.name: Field resolution (standard via Quick Add / custom via Add Object Fields)
phases.produces: routing/form-plan.json (fully-specified field list: label / query_key / field-width / required-XOR-hidden / zhc_ field_key)

phases.name: zhc_ custom fields + tags pre-created by Skill 44 (the grocery-shopping rule)
phases.owning_role: Skill 6 THINK layer emits the plan -> Skill 44 (caf) executes it BEFORE the browser build
phases.produces: routing/form-dependency-plan.json (custom_fields[] + tags[] each stamped action=create|reuse) -> created IDs written to the run ledger

phases.name: The DUMB browser build (F1..F13) + embed splice
phases.owning_role: Skill 6 THINK layer emits the click list -> DUMB browser operator (agent-browser) executes -> embed splice via ghl_rest_canvas
phases.produces: routing/form-click-list.json (F1..F13) -> form-operator-report.json + captured embed snippet + parsed form id + share/preview link + shots/NNN-<phase>.png

phases.name: render_check 200 + marker in DOM + tag workflow + preview/approve + QC >= 8.5
phases.owning_role: Skill 6 QC (qc-built-form.sh) + Skill 44 tag workflow -> owner (human approval)
phases.produces: qc-built-form.sh PASS (QC-F1..F11), render_check 200, the Form Submitted -> Add Contact Tag workflow, preview URL, a labeled downloads bundle

labeling_grammar.note: Every form deliverable (locked brief, resolved field list, dependency plan, embed snippet + host-page splice, preview) is labeled; vNN is a zero-padded version (v01, v02, ...). Mirrors the funnel-craft grammar shape.

client_runtime_rule: On a client box the engine uses the CLIENT's OWN configured providers + keys. NEVER Anthropic / claude-* models or operator keys. The deterministic gates (_run_preflight, qc-built-form.sh, render_check) are provider-neutral stdlib Python and run identically everywhere. Browser control + vision QC use MiniMax M3 (probe-gated) -> DeepSeek v4 pro; reasoning uses Ollama-Cloud -> OpenRouter -> Gemini last-resort; MiniMax M2 is BANNED. Publishing is human-approved.
flexibility: guide-not-rule: honor an explicit owner choice about fields / tags / styling / embed target. But the zhc_ marker, required-XOR-hidden exclusivity, custom-via-object-fields, embed-verbatim (no SRI), and render-200 + marker-in-DOM are prover/QC-enforced hard AF-FORM-* auto-fails, not opinions.
